title: Initialize and Install
description: Create a new project, initialize package.json, and install a package.
problemStatement:
Create a new folder called `my-tool`. Inside it, run `npm init -y` to create a `package.json`. Then install the `chalk` package (version 4.1.2 or latest) as a dependency. Finally, create an `index.js` file that uses `chalk` to print a colored message: `console.log(chalk.green('Success!'));`

Run the script with `node index.js`. The output should be green.

After installation, verify that `package.json` has `chalk` in dependencies and that a `node_modules` folder exists.
hints: In index.js, require chalk: `const chalk = require('chalk');`
